news.headline: Crypto gaming news: Pokémon card auction hits $250K, 'Pixels' $4M comp, 'Nifty Island' token update. Stay informed this weekend!
news.summary: Stay updated on the latest developments in the world of cryptocurrency and NFT gaming with this week's top news. Discover exciting updates and insights in our newest compilation, featuring the most significant happenings in the industry. Don't miss out on the chance to dive into some weekend reads and stay informed on the latest trends and advancements.

news.headline: Disagrees with the authenticity of 'Ancient Japanese Wisdom' in a recent article.
AbbVie reveals emotional impact report on underrepresented CLL patients; Black, Hispanic, Asian individuals experience more negative emotions. CLL affects over 200,000 adults.
news.summary: Recent findings reveal that Black, Hispanic, and Asian individuals undergoing treatment for chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) are more likely to have adverse emotional experiences and outlooks. CLL, a prevalent form of leukemia among adults, impacts over 200,000 individuals in the population.

news.headline: SK Life Science, Inc. presented XCOPRI® CV data at AES 2024 Annual Meeting, revealing deeper understanding of Cenobamate's action mechanism.
news.summary: In Paramus, New Jersey on December 8, 2024, SK Life Science, Inc., a prominent company specializing in treatments for central nervous system (CNS) disorders and a subsidiary of SK Biopharmaceuticals Co., Ltd., revealed findings at the American Epilepsy Society (AES) Annual Meeting. The data presented focused on its antiseizure medication.

news.headline: Cannabis sales dip in Massachusetts and New Mexico, with sales totaling $152M in MA for Nov. 2024, a 1% decrease from Oct.
news.summary: The cannabis industry in the U.S. is experiencing diverse outcomes in key markets, with California, Massachusetts, and New Mexico seeing significant developments. California stands out for generating the highest tax revenue, while Massachusetts and New Mexico are witnessing slight decreases in sales, indicating broader market trends.In Massachusetts, legal cannabis sales in November 2024 amounted to $152 million, showing a 1% drop from October but a 4% rise from November 2023. Over the October-November quarter, sales reached $305 million, reflecting a 5% decline from the previous quarter. The average price per gram decreased to $4.58, hitting the lowest point since 2020.For more in-depth analysis and essential updates on the cannabis industry and market activities, subscribe to Benzinga’s newsletter for free. Don’t miss out on crucial insights if you are serious about this business sector.

news.headline: US forces carry out airstrikes targeting ISIS camps in Syria: US CENTCOM
Bitcoin hits milestone, surpassing $100K mark! Play these free games to earn extra bitcoins. Explore the new list.
news.summary: UPDATE: The value of Bitcoin has surpassed $100,000, marking a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency market. As a result, individuals now have the opportunity to earn Bitcoin by participating in various games. A revised list of games that offer this opportunity has been released, providing users with the chance to engage with the cryptocurrency and potentially increase their holdings.

news.headline: Proposed bill could transfer $100B from taxpayers to Bitcoin owners via U.S. Treasury acquiring one million Bitcoins at $100,000 each. Funded by cryptocurrency advocates benefiting GOP lawmakers.
news.summary: During a recent segment on MSNBC's All In, host Chris Hayes discussed a Senate bill introduced by Sen. Cynthia Lummis (R-Wyo.) that proposes the U.S. Treasury purchase one million Bitcoins over five years, holding them for at least 20 years. With Bitcoin trading at $100,000 each, this acquisition would amount to a $100 billion transfer from taxpayers to Bitcoin owners. Hayes highlighted concerns that Republican lawmakers, who have received significant campaign contributions from cryptocurrency advocates, may be looking for a bailout if the market crashes. This development has sparked debate and speculation about the potential implications of such a significant financial transfer.

news.headline: World Teqball Championships 2024 in Budapest had record number of participating countries and athletes, showcasing historical results.
news.summary: In Budapest, Hungary on December 8, 2024, the latest World Teqball Championships showcased its distinctive attributes once again. The 2024 edition stood out for the remarkable diversity of participating countries, surpassing previous records. This year, the tournament welcomed the highest number of athletes registering to participate, marking it as a significant moment in the championship's history.

Biden to Send Senior US Officials to Middle East
Beam Therapeutics presents NHP data at ASH Annual Meeting, showing success with CD117 mAb conditioning for treating Sickle Cell Disease.
news.summary: Recent data from non-human primate studies revealed that conditioning with CD117 monoclonal antibody resulted in the successful long-term engraftment of base-edited hematopoietic stem cells. This approach also triggered significant levels of hemoglobin F production. The findings emphasize the potential of this method in achieving effective stem cell engraftment and enhancing hemoglobin F levels.

Assad and his family seek asylum in Moscow after fleeing Syria.
Cardano Foundation falls victim to X account hack, posting scam links before removal. Securities and Exchange Commission also hit.
news.summary: The Cardano Foundation is now part of a growing number of organizations that have been targeted by X successful account hacks, a list that also includes the Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.headline: Assad and family arrive in Moscow: TASS
AI stocks face pressure to demonstrate revenue or strategic advantage. Palantir stands out with soaring growth.
news.summary: In the midst of the excitement surrounding artificial intelligence, the top-performing AI stocks are either generating significant revenue or gaining a competitive advantage through strategic initiatives. Major tech giants and cloud computing leaders are currently facing a critical juncture, requiring tangible results to prove the value of their AI investments. Notably, Palantir has experienced a significant surge in its stock performance.

news.headline: Palantir stock rallies 344% in 2024 post-Trump, driven by government AI automation prospects, making it a buy or sell?
news.summary: After experiencing a 344% surge in 2024, the value of PLTR stock has seen a significant increase, particularly following Trump's election victory. This surge is largely attributed to the anticipation of a spike in government AI automation. The continuous rise in Palantir's stock has prompted discussions on whether it is advisable to buy or sell given its current high valuation. This trend has been highlighted in a recent article from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Syria's Assad is in Moscow - Russian agencies cite Kremlin source.
Russia grants Syria's Assad and family asylum - Russian agencies cite Kremlin source.
60.9B Dogecoin moved in 24 hours, signaling bullish trend. $23B total transactions, 40.1% surge.
news.summary: In the past 24 hours, a staggering amount of 60.9 billion Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) was transacted, indicating a potential bullish trend for the meme cryptocurrency. Data from IntoTheBlock shows a 40.1% increase in Dogecoin's transaction volume, reaching $23 billion or 60.9 billion DOGE during this period. Transactions exceeding $100,000, known as large transactions, typically signify strong buying or selling activity. This surge in transaction volume corresponds with a notable rise in DOGE's price, hinting at growing market activity.

news.headline: Agios reports positive results from Phase 3 ENERGIZE-T study of Mitapivat for thalassemia at ASH 2024, meeting key endpoints.
news.summary: The ENERGIZE-T study successfully met primary and all major secondary objectives in adult patients suffering from transfusion-dependent alpha- or beta-thalassemia. This important milestone was achieved by enrolling a significant number of individuals with the condition, demonstrating positive outcomes in various key areas. This promising development signifies a breakthrough in the treatment of these types of thalassemia and holds great potential for improving the quality of life for patients.

news.headline: TECVAYLI® shows promise in frontline therapy for newly diagnosed multiple myeloma with 100% MRD negativity rates in trials.
news.summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) revealed new frontline data on Dec. 8, 2024, showing that all evaluable patients undergoing minimal residual disease (MRD) testing in MajesTEC-5 induction therapy and MajesTEC-4 maintenance therapy achieved MRD negativity. This means that 100% of patients in the study who were tested for MRD showed negative results, indicating a successful treatment outcome.

news.headline: Biden to Speak on Syria at 1 pm in Washington
Novartis' Scemblix shows superior efficacy in CML patients; ASC4FIRST trial reveals MMR rates at week 96, presented at ASH.
news.summary: Novartis announced positive results from the Phase III ASC4FIRST trial for Scemblix® (asciminib), revealing superior major molecular response (MMR) rates at week 96. The study compared the MMR rate of Scemblix against standard-of-care tyrosine kinase inhibitors (TKIs) such as imatinib, nilotinib, dasatinib, and bosutinib, as well as imatinib alone in adults with newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome-positive chronic myeloid leukemia in chronic phase (Ph+ CML-CP) at the week 96 evaluation. The study's key secondary endpoints were met, showcasing an increasing gap in MMR rate between Scemblix and standard-of-care treatments, imatinib, and 2G TKIs (nilotinib, dasatinib, bosutinib). These findings were unveiled at the 66th!American Society of Hematology Annual Meeting & Exposition.

news.headline: Roche's Polivy combo therapy for aggressive lymphoma proves superior in 5-year study. Data presented at ASH: 60.9 months follow-up, significant efficacy and safety.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, Roche disclosed information about the five-year follow-up results of the phase III POLARIX study, which assessed Polivy® (polatuzumab vedotin) combined with MabThera®/Rituxan® (rituximab), cyclophosphamide, doxorubicin, and prednisone (R-CHP) in individuals with untreated diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL). The data was revealed during an oral presentation at the 66th American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting and Exposition held from December 7-10, 2024, in San Diego, US. The analysis, following a median follow-up of 60.9 months, included information on primary and secondary endpoints, along with safety findings.

news.headline: C4 Therapeutics presents phase 1 data for Cemsidomide at ASH: 36% ORR, 45% CBR in MM, responses seen across all dose levels.
news.summary: In a study on Multiple Myeloma, the combination of Cemsidomide with Dexamethasone at the highest dose level investigated so far produced a 36% Overall Response Rate (ORR) and a 45% Clinical Benefit Rate (CBR). Encouragingly, positive responses were observed at all dose levels tested, indicating potential efficacy across a range of treatment strengths.

news.headline: Syrian President Assad overthrown by rebels in recent advancement, as reported by Bloomberg.
DOJ appeals injunction of CTA after Texas ruling on BOIR. Appeal filed on Dec. 5, 2024. FT. LAUDERDALE, Fla. Dec. 8, 2024.
news.summary: Following the injunction of the Comprehensive Trade Agreement (CTA) by the Texas federal court on December 3, 2024, the Department of Justice (DOJ) submitted a formal notice of appeal on December 5, 2024. This challenge was made public in Ft. Lauderdale, Fla., where the news was shared via PRNewswire-PRWeb on December 8, 2024. The appeal was lodged promptly after the court ruling and signifies the DOJ's intent to contest the decision regarding the CTA.

news.headline: A contestant submitted 200 entries to the International AI Short Films Contest, but none made it to the Longlist.
news.summary: One participant in the International AI Short Films Contest, UnHuman Shorts, made a surprising display of dedication by submitting a remarkable total of 200 entries. The organizers were taken aback by this unexpected commitment. However, despite the impressive volume, none of the entries managed to secure a spot on the Longlist of the contest. The incident took place in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

news.headline: Siemon releases 2024 ESG Report showcasing commitment to sustainability and social responsibility.
news.summary: Siemon Company, a renowned leader in network infrastructure solutions worldwide, has unveiled its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. The newly released report showcases Siemon's steadfast dedication to sustainability, social responsibility, and comprehensive governance practices.

news.headline: Apple sued for hosting child sexual abuse material, failing to protect survivors. Lawsuit filed for thousands of survivors.
news.summary: A significant legal case has been initiated on behalf of numerous survivors of child sexual abuse images and videos (CSAM) that were circulated on Apple platforms. The lawsuit was filed in Cupertino, California on December 8, 2024. It is a class action lawsuit representing thousands of individuals affected by this heinous crime.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs in the US hold over 1.1 million Bitcoin worth $110 billion, surpassing Satoshi Nakamoto's holdings.
news.summary: Bitcoin ETFs in the U.S. have now accumulated more Bitcoin than Satoshi Nakamoto, the creator of Bitcoin. As per CoinGlass data, as of Thursday's market close, these ETFs held a collective 1,105,690 Bitcoin valued at $110 billion. This milestone was achieved by 10 asset managers who started trading these products on January 11, except for Grayscale's Bitcoin Mini Trust. Nakamoto, who disappeared in 2011, is believed to have mined around 1.1 million Bitcoin in the project's initial seven months. The fact that Bitcoin ETFs now hold more Bitcoin than Nakamoto is a significant moment in the asset's history. This development underscores the growing presence of institutional investment in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: Affimed's study shows safety and efficacy of Acimtamig and AlloNK® in R/R cHL patients. 22 patients in the trial.
news.summary: In Mannheim, Germany, on December 8, 2024, Affimed N.V. (Nasdaq: AFMD), a clinical-stage immuno-oncology company, disclosed data at the 66th ASH Annual Meeting and Exposition through a poster session. The dataset unveiled information on 22 patients participating in the run-in phase of the LuminICE-203 (AFM13-203) phase 2 open-label, multicenter, multi-cohort study. The trial aims to assess the safety and efficacy of combining acimtamig (AFM13) with Artiva Biotherapeutics’ allogeneic NK cell AlloNK® in individuals with R/R cHL (relapsed or refractory classical Hodgkin lymphoma).

news.headline: Molecular Partners presents positive data on MP0533 study and MP0621 at ASH 2024, showing safety and antileukemic effects.
news.summary: The ongoing MP0533 phase 1/2a trial has shown promising results with a favorable safety profile. The study involves dose escalation and has showcased initial antileukemic effects along with positive pharmacodynamic activity. The trial has progressed smoothly so far, demonstrating encouraging outcomes in terms of safety and efficacy. The findings indicate potential benefits for individuals with leukemia, with further analysis and monitoring underway to gauge the full extent of these effects.

news.headline: Cogent Biosciences reports promising new data from Phase 2 APEX Trial for Bezuclastinib in AdvSM patients.
China's economy remains stable with 5.3% growth in Q1, 4.7% in Q2, and 4.6% in Q3 in 2024, as stated by People's Daily.
news.summary: In a retrospective of the Chinese economy's performance in 2024, it was observed that the country saw a 5.3 percent year-on-year growth in domestic GDP in the first quarter, followed by a 4.7 percent increase in the second quarter, and a 4.6 percent rise in the third quarter. These figures highlight the varying growth rates experienced throughout the year in different quarters.

news.summary: In the past week, eleven large-cap stocks stood out as top performers, with notable increases in share prices:1. Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (NASDAQ: CRDO) saw a substantial 51.61% surge following the release of its second-quarter results. Several analyst firms revised their price targets upwards for the stock.2. Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) witnessed a solid 34.59% increase in its stock value. An internal investigation conducted by its Special Committee concluded no instances of misconduct or fraud involving the management or board.3. DocuSign, Inc. (NASDAQ: DOCU) experienced a significant 34.26% jump in share price post its third-quarter results announcement. For further details, visit Benzinga.com. news.headline: 11 large-cap stocks, including TPL (-16.35%), MCHP (-13.03%), INTC (-13.01%), KB (-12.68%), and others, were top losers last week.
news.summary: These eleven large-cap stocks have experienced notable declines in the past week, possibly impacting investors' portfolios. Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) saw a significant drop of 16.35%, potentially influenced by OPEC's supply decision. Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) shares plummeted by 13.03% following the company's decision to halt its application for U.S. semiconductor government grants and a reduction of revenue guidance for the December 2024 quarter. Intel Corporation (NASDAQ:INTC) experienced a dive of 13.01% after announcing the retirement of CEO Pat Gelsinger. KB Financial Group Inc (NYSE:KB) witnessed a decline of 12.68%. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: DARZALEX FASPRO reduces progression risk by 51% in high-risk smoldering multiple myeloma patients. Aiming to prevent organ damage and improve survival rates.
news.summary: Johnson & Johnson has unveiled the initial subcutaneous anti-CD38 therapy, which has shown promising results in averting end-organ deterioration, and prolonging progression-free survival and overall survival. These outcomes are based on data obtained from the Phase 3 AQUILA study. The announcement was made on December 8, 2024, in San Diego. Johnson & Johnson is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol JNJ.

news.headline: CWTI delays 2024 Annual General Meeting materials due to Canadian postal strike, accessible online. #CWTI #CanadaPostalStrike
news.summary: In Guelph, Ontario, on December 8, 2024, Current Water Technologies Inc. (TSX-V: WATR) disclosed that its annual meeting documentation is experiencing delays due to the current postal strike in Canada. Shareholders can access the Company's meeting materials on the Company's SEDAR+ corporate website at www.sedarplus.ca and electronically at https://docs.tsxtrust.com/2198.

Progress in preventing and treating blood cancers showcased at ASH Annual Meeting in San Diego on Dec. 8, 2024.
news.summary: Exciting developments in various stages of patient care offer optimism for individuals battling blood cancers. Recent research shared at the 66th American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting and Exposition in San Diego on December 8, 2024, demonstrate significant advancements in both the prevention and treatment of these diseases. The studies reflect the potential for improvements in patient outcomes, showcasing a beacon of hope in the ongoing fight against blood cancers.

news.headline: Law firm KTMC encourages Wolfspeed investors with losses to join lawsuit filed, visit www.ktmc.com for info.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, in Radnor, Pennsylvania, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP announced through PRNewswire that a securities class action lawsuit has been initiated against Wolfspeed, Inc. ("Wolfspeed") (NYSE: WOLF). This lawsuit is on behalf of individuals who bought or gained stake in Wolfspeed's securities. For more information, the law firm's website www.ktmc.com can be accessed.

news.headline: Starmer focuses on restoring stability in Syria
DeFi hackers are turning it into a full-time job, but ImmuneFi founder notes crypto space is getting safer.
news.summary: Mitchell Amador, founder of ImmuneFi, reassured that despite the looming danger posed by "professional DeFi attackers," the security of the cryptocurrency realm is evidently enhancing.
